projects.title: Brand Identity: Aurora
projects.description: Aurora is a refined brand identity system inspired by gallery minimalism and atmospheric light gradients. The system balances bold typography with spacious layout logic to create timeless clarity.
projects.moodboardNotes: Research explored museum lighting, brutalist exhibition layouts, archival typography, celestial gradients, and restrained material palettes.
projects.processNotes: Began with monochrome logo sketches, developed modular grid systems, iterated typography scales, then refined color application and spatial rhythm.

projects.title: Poster Series: Transit
projects.description: Transit is a typographic poster series exploring motion, direction, and public infrastructure. The layouts emphasize speed and spatial rhythm through dynamic composition.
projects.moodboardNotes: Collected references from subway maps, kinetic typography experiments, Swiss grid systems, and large-scale signage design.
projects.processNotes: Created motion-driven layouts first, then translated them into static compositions. Iterated through 30+ typographic arrangements before finalizing the series.

projects.title: 3D Sculpture: Kinetic Form
projects.description: Kinetic Form is a sculptural study in motion and balance. Designed to be experienced physically in space, the piece explores curved tension and metallic material contrast.
projects.moodboardNotes: Material references included brushed metal, museum pedestal displays, soft spotlight falloff, and minimalist object presentation.
projects.processNotes: Blockout geometry → refine silhouette → UV unwrap → texture baking → material polish → lighting test renders.
